lesson_title: Professional and Academic Skills: Listening Lesson 4
learning_objective: Learners can argue, evaluate, clarify and organise detailed communication in a listening task about research.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand main ideas of complex texts and interact with fluency and spontaneity.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise listening for professional and academic skills. You will learn useful language connected to research and practise cleft sentences. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at B2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: cleft sentences. Vocabulary theme: research. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At B2, learners should argue, evaluate, clarify and organise detailed communication with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use cleft sentences to talk about research.
Example 2: The learner gives a B2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for B2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using cleft sentences.
options: Correct use of cleft sentences in a B2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with cleft sentences.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses cleft sentences accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of cleft sentences.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the research phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand research.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand research.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form cleft sentences. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about research using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: B2 Listening Check - Professional and Academic Skills
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short listening task using cleft sentences and vocabulary from research.
success_criteria: Uses cleft sentences with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses cleft sentences and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to research.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about research. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short B2 response about research. Include the target language: cleft sentences.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for B2-M02-L04. Speaker one: Today we are practising research. Speaker two: I need to use cleft sentences correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Cleft Sentences form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for cleft sentences
